product_name: Style 4 Ever Diamond Art 4-in-1 Studio with LED Drawing Board

bullets: Light up the creativity! Express yourself with the 3-in-1 Style 4 Ever Diamond Art Studio including everything you need to create dazzling drawings, diamond posters, and diamond stickers
Color It! Draw your own designs or trace the included templates on the light-up LED tray, then use the included markers to add a splash of color to your designs!
Bedazzle It! Use the included gems and diamond pen to add some sparkle to your drawings!
Stick It! Follow the specified numbers to add colorful gems to the included diamond posters and stickers!

Includes portable art studio with sliding, light-up, LED drawing board, and divided storage compartments; 3500+ gems in 13 vibrant colors, diamond pen, gem storage container, and gem tray; 6 markers and 1 double-tip felt pen; 4 drawing sheets; 4 poster sheets; 3 diamond posters; and 2 sticker sheets. Requires 3 AAA batteries (not included).
content.description: Let your creativity shine anytime, anywhere, with the portable 3-in-1 Style 4 Ever Diamond Art Studio! Draw your own designs or trace a template on the light-up LED drawing board, then add some sparkle with the diamond gems or follow the number patterns to create your own diamond art posters and stickers! Perfectly portable for creativity on the go, the Diamond Art studio includes divided storage compartments to hold all tools and papers. Includes portable art studio with sliding, light-up, LED drawing board, and divided storage compartments; 3500+ gems in 13 vibrant colors, diamond pen, gem storage container, and gem tray; 6 markers and 1 double-tip felt pen, 4 drawing sheets; 4 poster sheets; 3 diamond posters; and 2 sticker sheets

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 Portable art studio, 1 LED drawing board with divided strorage compartments. 3500+ gems, diamond pen, gem storage container, 1 gem tray, 5 markers, 1 felt pen, 4 drawing sheets, 4 poster sheets, 3 diamond posters, 2 stickers sheets
